text: I feel a curious sense of anticipation, standing just outside a glass-walled room that seems meticulously arranged for inquiry and thought. The space conveys an invitation to contemplation—"R + D" signals research and development, and I hear the faint hum of possibility inside. The clear, bright setting mixed with creative displays fosters both a sense of order and a call to engage with the unknown. I am eager, a little awed, and aware of the importance of places dedicated to exploration.
